hooks.command: bash /root/.claude/maestro-orient.sh > /root/.claude/maestro-precompact-snapshot.md 2>&1; printf 'CONTEXT IS ABOUT TO COMPACT. Durable memory is ON DISK and survives this: the project MEMORY.md + memory/*.md, /root/.claude/maestro-state.md (in-flight), /root/.claude/maestro-infra.md (infra). After compaction RE-READ maestro-state.md + the relevant memory file; do NOT trust the summary to have kept every detail. Stay the top engineer — do not become forgetful.'
